import React from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; const Navbar = () => { const { user, logout, isAdmin, isStudent } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; return (
🎓 EduManager
    {isStudent() && ( <>
  • Browse Courses
  • My Enrolments
    • )} {isAdmin() && ( <>
  • Dashboard
  • Manage Courses
  • Manage Students
    • )}
{user ? ( <>
{user.name} {user.role}
) : (
Sign In Sign Up
)}
); }; export default Navbar;
